opinion.h: BRIGGS, DOING BUSINESS AS WALT'S AUTO PARKS & GARAGES, v. CITY OF LOS ANGELES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE
opinion.p: No. 453. Decided December 15, 1958. Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Roger Arnebergh and Philip E. Grey for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
